name: resolved conflict records are retained in the log for audit traceability and not deleted
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus && printf '{"pattern_id":"p1","resolved":true,"resolution":"accept"}\n' > pr-corpus/decisions.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/list-decisions.sh" --log pr-corpus/decisions.jsonl --include-resolved 2>out.txt && grep -q '"pattern_id":"p1"' out.txt && grep -q 'resolved_count=1' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
